certificate.description: The public key of the certificate authority.

certificateAuthorityType.description: The type of certificate authority. The possible values are: root, intermediate, unknownFutureValue. Supports $filter (eq).

certificateRevocationListUrl.description: The URL to check if the certificate is revoked.

createdDateTime.description: The date and time when the certificate authority was created.

displayName.description: The display name of the certificate authority.

expirationDateTime.description: The date and time when the certificate authority expires. Supports $filter (eq) and $orderby.

isIssuerHintEnabled.description: Indicates whether the certificate picker presents the certificate authority to the user to use for authentication. Default value is false. Optional.

issuer.description: The issuer of the certificate authority.

issuerSubjectKeyIdentifier.description: The subject key identifier of certificate authority.

thumbprint.description: The thumbprint of certificate authority certificate. Supports $filter (eq, startswith).
